_note: Baseline recorded on Linux x86_64, SQLite bundled, WAL mode, tmpfs. Update with scripts/consumer-profile-test.sh --update-baseline after a clean release build.

scenario_a_1kb.description: 1 KB payload, 1000 sequential appends, WAL checkpoint

scenario_b_10kb.description: 10 KB payload, 1000 sequential appends, WAL checkpoint

scenario_c_40kb.description: 40 KB payload, 1000 sequential appends, WAL checkpoint

scenario_d_read_aggregate.description: Aggregate over 10 000 events in one stream, no payload filter

scenario_e_causation_walk.description: walk_causation forward, chain depth 20, 1000 leaf nodes
